## Checklist

- [ ] Targets the `dev` branch (not `main`)
- [ ] `scripts/ci-local.sh` is green (`go test ./...` + frontend tests)
- [ ] New/changed behavior is covered by a test (parser/handler tests use recorded fixtures)
- [ ] Docs updated alongside the code they describe
- [ ] Stays within scope: passive, ToS-safe, no radar/ESP/memory/injection/automation
- [ ] Commit messages have no AI co-author trailers
